definition: Consciousness arising dependent on the body and tangibles.
notes: The project prefers body-consciousness because it stays close to the canonical sixfold formula. Tactile consciousness is acceptable in explanatory prose when the specific sensory mode needs clearer English labeling.

context_rules.context: In most analytical and source-facing contexts
In explanatory prose emphasizing the tactile mode

example_phrases.pali: kāyañca paṭicca phoṭṭhabbe ca uppajjati kāyaviññāṇaṃ
example_phrases.translation: dependent on the body and tangibles, body-consciousness arises
